$comment: Default ACP agent registry for EvoClaw. Embedded at compile time via include_str!. Users can override the entire catalog by writing ~/.evoclaw/agents/registry.json or add/override single entries by dropping JSON files into ~/.evoclaw/agents/registry.d/. Distribution kinds: 'npx' = `npx -y <package> <args>`; 'command' = direct exec of <cmd> <args> from PATH; 'binary' = pure metadata, install_hint tells the user how to fetch it.

agents.name: Claude Agent (Anthropic)
agents.description: Official Anthropic+Zed ACP wrapper around Claude Code.
agents.install_hint: uses npx to fetch @agentclientprotocol/claude-agent-acp on first run (no global install needed)
agents.auth_hint: first run: opens https://claude.ai/login (your Claude subscription)
agents.notes: Same package Zed installs from the ACP Registry.

agents.name: Gemini CLI (Google)
agents.auth_hint: first run: `gemini` opens Google OAuth (Gemini Code Assist) or set GEMINI_API_KEY
agents.notes: Built into the official @google/gemini-cli package via --experimental-acp.

agents.name: Codex CLI (OpenAI)
agents.description: Zed-maintained ACP adapter around OpenAI's Codex CLI.
agents.install_hint: uses npx to fetch @zed-industries/codex-acp on first run (binary releases at github.com/zed-industries/codex-acp)
agents.auth_hint: first run: opens https://chatgpt.com/oauth (your ChatGPT subscription)
agents.notes: From the ACP Registry; npx distribution avoids platform-specific binaries.

agents.name: Cursor Agent
agents.description: Cursor's coding agent with native ACP via the `acp` subcommand.
agents.auth_hint: first run: opens cursor.com/login (your Cursor subscription)
agents.notes: Cursor's `acp` subcommand exposes Zed Agent Client Protocol natively.

agents.name: Amp (frontier coding agent)
agents.description: Sourcegraph Amp coding agent with ACP wrapper.
agents.install_hint: uses npx to fetch @sourcegraph/amp-acp on first run (binary releases at github.com/tao12345666333/amp-acp)
agents.auth_hint: first run: prompts for Sourcegraph credentials
agents.notes: Community ACP wrapper for Sourcegraph Amp; published on the ACP Registry.

agents.name: Auggie CLI (Augment Code)
agents.description: Augment Code's coding agent with native ACP support.
agents.auth_hint: first run: `auggie login` for Augment Code account
agents.notes: Augment Code's coding agent with native ACP support.

agents.name: GitHub Copilot
agents.description: GitHub Copilot CLI is a one-shot suggester, not an ACP server.
agents.install_hint: brew install gh && gh extension install github/gh-copilot
agents.auth_hint: first run: `gh auth login` then `gh copilot` (your Copilot subscription)
agents.notes: Custom shim required to bridge gh-copilot to Zed ACP.

agents.name: Aider (open-source pair programmer)
agents.description: Aider is an interactive TUI, not an ACP server.
agents.install_hint: pipx install aider-chat (or pip install aider-chat)
agents.auth_hint: configure with any model: e.g. `aider --model deepseek-chat`, key via env DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
agents.notes: Custom shim required to bridge aider to Zed ACP.

agents.name: Qwen Code (阿里通义灵码 CLI)
agents.description: Qwen Code uses the Tongyi protocol, not Zed ACP.
agents.auth_hint: first run: `qwen` prompts for DashScope API key (https://bailian.console.aliyun.com)
agents.notes: Custom shim required to bridge qwen-code to Zed ACP.
